name: Wanted: Dead Or Alive
short_description: Dive into the Wild West in Wanted: Dead or Alive! Spot the outlaw in a crowd before time runs out. Fast-paced, addictive, and challenging—can you capture every bandit before they disappear?
detailed_description: Step into the Wild West with Wanted: Dead or Alive, a fast-paced puzzle game that will put your observation skills to the test. Your mission: spot the wanted outlaw among a crowd of ever-moving cowboys. As you progress, the challenge intensifies—time speeds up, and a single mistake could cost you your bounty. With its simple yet addictive gameplay, Wanted: Dead or Alive will push your reflexes and focus to the limit. Can you catch all the bandits before they vanish into the crowd?
about_the_game: Step into the Wild West with Wanted: Dead or Alive, a fast-paced puzzle game that will put your observation skills to the test.
